translationDisclaimer: Lesi siguqulelo sinikezwa ukuze kube lula kuwe. Uma kukhona ukungqubuzana, inguqulo yesiNgisi yale nqubomgomo iyosebenza.
privacyDataWeCollect: BicycleRepairStations.com ayidingi ama-akhawunti abasebenzisi futhi ayiqoqi ulwazi lomuntu siqu oluhlonzwayo ngokuqondile. Awekho amakhukhi okukhangisa asetshenzisiswayo. Izehlakalo zokusetshenziswa nokusebenza ezingaziwa ziqoqwa nge-Vercel Analytics ne-Vercel Speed Insights, kufaka phakathi izehlakalo zokusebenzisana ezisezingeni eliphezulu njengezenzo zokwabelana.
privacyLocation: Uma unika imvume yendawo, ama-coordinates akho asetshenziswa kuphela ukubeka ibalazwe esimweni esifanele nokuthola iziteshi eziseduze. Indawo yakho ayithunyelwa kumaseva ethu — icutshungulwa ngokuphelele kusiphequluli sakho futhi ilahlwa uma uvala uhlelo lokusebenza.
privacyIpGeolocation: Uma ukuthola indawo ngesiphequluli kunqatshiwe noma kungekho, uhlelo lokusebenza lusebenzisa ikheli lakho le-IP ukuthola indawo yakho elinganiselayo ukuze ibalazwe libekwe eduze kwakho futhi kuphakanyiswe ulimi kanye neyunithi yebanga. Le inqubo isekelwe esizathwini esisemthethweni (GDPR Art. 6(1)(f)). I-IP icutshungulwa yifankshini ye-Vercel edge; awekho amakheli e-IP agcinwayo noma abhaliswa yilolu hlelo lokusebenza. Ungashintsha ulimi lwakho kanye nezintandokazi ze-yunithi nganoma yisiphi isikhathi kumenyu yezilungiselelo.
privacyLocalStorage: Izilungiselelo zakho (iyunithi yebanga, ithimu yombala, ulimi) zigcinwa kusitoreji sasendaweni sesiphequluli sakho ukuze zihlale phakathi kwezivakashelo. Le datha ayiphumi edivayisini yakho.
privacySharing: Uma usebenzisa amathuluzi okwabelana ohlelo lokusebenza, izixhumanisi zingafaka amapharamitha yomkhankaso (isibonelo, amathegi omthombo/isilinganiso/umkhankaso) ukuze kulinganiswe imithombo yethrafikhi ehlanganisiwe. Noma yikuphi okuqukethwe okukhetha ukukwabelana kuthunyelwa nguwe ngokuqondile kunkundla ekhethiwe, uhlelo lokusebenza, noma iklayenti ye-imeyili ngaphansi kwemigomo yobumfihlo yaleyo nsizakalo.
privacyThirdParty: Izithombe zamathayela zilayishwa kuma-seva e-CARTO, ESRI, Stadia Maps, ne-OpenStreetMap. Laba baboneleli bangabhala ikheli lakho le-IP njengengxenye yokusebenza okujwayelekile kwewebhu seva. Idatha yeziteshi ilandwa ku-Overpass API. Ukusesha kwendawo kusebenzisa insizakalo ye-Nominatim geocoding. Izehlakalo ezingaziwa zokuhlola amakhasi, ukusebenza, nokusebenzisana ziqoqwa yi-Vercel Analytics ne-Vercel Speed Insights. Uma ukhetha izenzo zokwabelana, izixhumanisi zingavulwa ezinkundleni zezinkampani zangaphandle (isibonelo, X, Facebook, ababoneleli be-imeyili, noma izinhloso zokwabelana zedivayisi). Sicela ubheke inqubomgomo yobumfihlo nemigomo yomboneleli ngamunye ukuze uthole imininingwane.
privacyChildren: Le nsizakalo ayibhekisiwe ezinganeni ezingaphansi kweminyaka engu-13. Asiqoqi ngamabomu idatha evela ezinganeni.
privacyContact: Imibuzo mayelana nale nqubomgomo ingathunyelwa ekhelini elibhaliwe ku-BicycleRepairStations.com.
termsAcceptance: Ngokusebenzisa BicycleRepairStations.com uyavuma kule migomo. Uma ungavumi, sicela uyeke ukusebenzisa insizakalo.
termsService: Lolu hlelo lokusebenza lukusiza uthole iziteshi zokulungisa amabhayisikili zomphakathi ezivezwe ku-OpenStreetMap. Lubuye lufake amathuluzi okwabelana akhethekayo okusabalalisa izixhumanisi zohlelo lokusebenza ngemigudu yakho siqu. Insizakalo inikezwa mahhala njengethuluzi eliwusizo kwabagibeli bamabhayisikili.
termsAccuracy: Idatha yeziteshi itholakala ku-OpenStreetMap, isikhwama sedatha esihlolwa umphakathi. Ulwazi lungaba lungaphelele, lungalungile, noma lungasasebenzi. Hlola njalo ukuthi isiteshi sikhona futhi siyasebenza ngaphambi kokuthembela kuso ukulungisa. Asamukeli isibopho seziteshi ezingekho, ezimakwe ngokungafanele, noma ezisusiwe.
termsSharing: Uma usebenzisa izici zokwabelana, unesibopho salokho okushicilelayo nokuthi ukushicilela kuphi. Ungasebenzisi insizakalo ukuthumela ugaxekile, ukuhlukumeza, noma ukuthumela okuqukethwe okungekho emthethweni. Unesibopho sokulandela imigomo yanoma iyiphi inkundla yenkampani yangaphandle oyisebenzisayo.
termsWarranty: Insizakalo inikezwa "njengoba injalo" ngaphandle kwesiqinisekiso sanoma yiluphi uhlobo, esichazwe ngokucacile noma esicashile. Asiqinisekisi ukutholakala, ukunemba, noma ukufaneleka injongo ethile.
termsLiability: Ngokufinyelela okukhulu okuvunyelwa umthetho, BicycleRepairStations.com kanye nabasebenzisi bayo abanasibopho sanoma yimiphi umonakalo oqondile, ongaqondile, owenzeka ngengozi, noma ongumphumela ovela ekusebenziseni kwakho noma ekungakwazini ukusebenzisa insizakalo.
termsThirdParty: Amathayela ebalazwe, idatha yeziteshi, imiphumela ye-geocoding, nezindawo zokwabelana ezikhethekayo zinikezwa yizinkampani zangaphandle. Imigomo yazo yokusebenzisa iyasebenza.
termsChanges: Singabuyekeza le migomo nganoma yisiphi isikhathi. Ukuqhubeka usebenzisa insizakalo ngemva kokushicilelwa kwezinguquko kusho ukwamukela imigomo ebuyekeziwe.
